chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-5149 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For order on Misc.No.18567/23 2. For order on office objection 3. For hearing of main case 12.05.2025 Mr. Kashif Hanif, advocate for respondent No.2. Mr. Ghulam Hyder Shaikh, advocate for respondent No.3. Mr. Muhammad Hisham Mahar, AAG. ------ None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed in non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Hafiz
